chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-903 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No. 4870/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 3. For orders on M.A.No. 4871/2025 (E/A). 4. For orders on M.A.No. 4872/2025 (S/A). 5. For hearing of main case. ------ 03.09.2025 Mr. Irfan Ahmed Panhwar, Advocate a/w Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-5. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner does not wish to press this petition alongwith listed applications; however, seeks permission to file proper appeal/representation before the competent authority as well as Sindh Service Tribunal as the case may be. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh, present in the court in connection with some other matters, waives notice of instant petition and after going through the file does not oppose the proposal so advanced by the counsel for the petitioner. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
